title: pilosella procera
intro: Pilosella procera is a plant species, also known as the tall mouse-ear hawk's-beard, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella procera has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Pilosella procera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders and other health issues.
